summary: Frontend-only regression + EducationGate copy verification. All acceptance criteria pass in preview environment.
verified_checks: /kategori/egitim renders EducationGate with new title 'Bu Alan Sadece PrivyAlgo Terminal Paketini satın almış ve/veya "Eğitim İçerikleri"ni satın almış kullanıcılara özeldir!' (data-testid=education-gate)
Gate body contains inline '+90 541 547 8141' link (data-testid=edu-gate-whatsapp-inline) and 'whatsapp destek hattımıza msj atınız' phrase
Old removed line 'Erişim almak için PrivyAlgo eğitim programlarına kayıt olun veya admin ile iletişime geçin.' is NOT present
Green WhatsApp Destek button (data-testid=edu-gate-whatsapp) href starts with https://wa.me/905415478141
Article detail /makale/opsiyon-101-greeks-delta-gamma-theta-vega-nedir renders the gate (restricted content hidden)
Home page /: hero-section, featured-section, latest-section all rendered; zero console errors
API calls go to REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL (https://privyalgo-blog.preview.emergentagent.com/api/*), 20 API requests observed - all successful
/login shows form with data-testid=login-email, login-password, login-submit
/dashboard redirects to / (home) when not logged in - regression OK
critical_code_review_comments: api.js fallback logic is clean and correct - empty REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL falls back to same-origin '/api' as intended for Codespaces scenario
EducationGate uses proper data-testid attributes and semantic HTML
Response interceptor safely handles ECONNABORTED, ERR_NETWORK and 401 without crashing app
context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration_5 verified EducationGate copy changes and API URL resolution in preview env. No regressions. Codespaces fallback code path (empty REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL → '/api' same-origin) was NOT runtime-tested here because preview env has the var set — but code review confirms the fallback is correct.
